records.ety: [L. ambiguus, fr. ambigere to wander about, waver; amb- + agere to drive.]

defs: Doubtful or uncertain, particularly in respect to signification; capable of being understood in either of two or more possible senses; equivocal; as, an ambiguous course; an ambiguous expression.
quotes: What have been thy answers? What but dark, Ambiguous, and with double sense deluding?
